data.name: deleteElementQuestion
data.value: Do you want to delete the item {0}?

data.name: deleteItemsGrid
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete the selected items?

data.name: CancelExportsInProcess
data.value: Do you want to Cancel exports in process?

data.name: GuardTourDahuaNote
data.value: Important: By Dahua regulations, you will not be able to view the presets previously saved in the guard. If in doubt, you can reconfigure the guard.

data.name: GridTypeRequired
data.value: You must select a grid type

data.name: GridTypeToDevicesNotEquals
data.value: The number of selected devices does not match the grid type

data.name: SiteNoExist
data.value: Site {0} is not configurate for your user.

data.name: BookmarkDeleteConfirm
data.value: The bookmark {0} will be removed. Are you sure?

data.name: CloseMainApp
data.value: Do you want to close the application?

data.name: BookmarkExportInProgress
data.value: The following bookmarks are being exported and cannot be deleted: {0}

data.name: BookmarkDeleteError
data.value: An error occurred while deleting the bookmark. Please try again.

data.name: confirmVault
data.value: {0} already exists. {1} Do you want to replace it?

data.name: VRecVideoNotExists
data.value: The requested video does not exist

data.name: VRecAudioDeviceError
data.value: Failed to open default audio device

data.name: Seproban_lblMsg12
data.value: An error occurred in the download. The video sequence you want does not exist

data.name: Seproban_lblMsg14
data.value: A download error has occurred. The server configuration may be incorrect

data.name: Seproban_lblMsg15
data.value: An error occurred while downloading the stream. the server may be down or not exist

data.name: Seproban_lblMsg16
data.value: The sequence you want has already been downloaded

data.name: Seproban_lblMsg17
data.value: A connection error occurred while trying to download data from the cameras

data.name: Seproban_lblMsg18
data.value: Generating sequence according to Seproban standard.

data.name: Seproban_lblMsg20
data.value: Frame sequence ready to send to Seproban.

data.name: Seproban_lblMsg22
data.value: The download and generation of the video sequence has been canceled

data.name: Seproban_lblMsg24
data.value: It was not possible to continue sending the sequence. Please check the connection status and try again.

data.name: Seproban_lblMsg25
data.value: The sequence you are trying to send to Seproban does not exist. Please try another directory.

data.name: Seproban_lblMsg31
data.value: Downloading sequence from the recorder ... This operation may take time!

data.name: Seproban_lblMsg37
data.value: Sending of previous sequence interrupted by user.

data.name: Seproban_lblMsg39
data.value: Sending video stream to Seproban ... This operation may take time!

data.name: Seproban_lblMsg7
data.value: An error occurred while loading the branch data and the application should be stopped. The data source does not exist or is currently being modified.

data.name: Seproban_lblMsg8
data.value: Video stream downloaded from the recorder.

data.name: Seproban_lblMsg9
data.value: Decoding frames ... This operation may take time!

data.name: MsgDownloadFolderFail
data.value: The Downloads folder is not available. Detail:

data.name: GridNotSelect
data.value: You must select at least one type of grid

data.name: CannotAccessFile
data.value: The process cannot access the file, it is being used by another process.

data.name: MessageBokmark
data.value: The end date and time of the bookmark is higher than the current date and time, therefore we cannot proceed with the export of the video. Do you want us to modify the end date and time of the bookmark automatically to the current date and time to export it?

data.name: SmartProcessDuplicated
data.value: There is an SmartClient instance running, do you want to close it and continue with the current one?

data.name: ErrorSelectedTypeGrilla
data.value: The number of elements is greater than the elements of the selected grid.

data.name: DateStartEndError
data.value: Start Time must be greather than End Time.

data.name: DiscardAllAlarms
data.value: Do you want to discard all Alarms?

data.name: BookmarksDeleteConfirm
data.value: Bookmarks {0} will be removed. Are you sure?

data.name: DidNotSelectGrid
data.value: Please select an element from the grid

data.name: NumberOutOfRange
data.value: The number you entered is outside the allowed range

data.name: FolderBrowserConfirm
data.value: Do you want to change the download path to the following:

data.name: DeviceStatusConfirm
data.value: You want to change the parameter to display the status of the devices?

data.name: DeviceStatusSuccess
data.value: Updated the parameter to display the status of the devices successfully.

data.name: ContainsNoItemsAvailable
data.value: The grid contains no available spaces

data.name: PasswordAlreadyUsed
data.value: Failed to change password: That password has already been used, please enter a different one.

data.name: limitFullScreen
data.value: The maximum number of full screen windows has been reached.

data.name: limitInstantPlayback
data.value: The maximum number of instant replay windows has been reached.

data.name: WantRetrieveAlarms
data.value: Do you want to retrieve this alarm?

data.name: CustomSettingsMsg
data.value: The new settings will be applied upon restarting Smart Client

data.name: AccessLevelRevokedMsg
data.value: The user's access level has been revoked

data.name: OutOfHoursMsg
data.value: The use of the application is outside of operating hours

data.name: CarouselText
data.value: Inactive carousel. All cameras on the grid.

data.name: CalendarRecordsLabel
data.value: Select a day and a camera

data.name: WarningCarousel
data.value: * You must select more than one camera in order to create the carousel

data.name: MessageBookmarkVideo
data.value: Recording not available on this device. Please try downloading again.

data.name: MessageJoystick
data.value: A joystick device must be connected to access the settings.

data.name: BookmarkNameError
data.value: The name cannot be empty or contain special characters.

data.name: StartDateError
data.value: The start date cannot be greater than the end date.

data.name: EndDateError
data.value: The end date cannot be earlier than the start date.

data.name: ExceedsTabMsg
data.value: The maximum limit of {0} open tabs has been reached.

data.name: NoActionInFullScreen
data.value: Action not allowed while full screen is active.

data.name: StopClipBeforeFS
data.value: Stop videoclip before entering full screen mode.

data.name: GenericModalFormLimit
data.value: The maximum number of windows allowed was reached.
